'''鈭歡-th-y''' ('''kagathay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:logarithmise|logarithmise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:logarithmise|logarithmise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-th-y
|-
! Lemma
| kagathay
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathay|thigathay]] || [[word:jigathay|jigathay]] || [[word:shigathay|shigathay]] || [[word:kigathay|kigathay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathay|thuthugathay]] || [[word:jujugathay|jujugathay]] || [[word:shushugathay|shushugathay]] || [[word:kukugathay|kukugathay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugathay|thugathay]] || [[word:jugathay|jugathay]] || [[word:shugathay|shugathay]] || [[word:kugathay|kugathay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugathay|thugathay]] || [[word:jugathay|jugathay]] || [[word:shugathay|shugathay]] || [[word:kugathay|kugathay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thegathay|thegathay]] || [[word:jegathay|jegathay]] || [[word:shegathay|shegathay]] || [[word:kegathay|kegathay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogathay|thothogathay]] || [[word:jojogathay|jojogathay]] || [[word:shoshogathay|shoshogathay]] || [[word:kokogathay|kokogathay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogathay|thogathay]] || [[word:jogathay|jogathay]] || [[word:shogathay|shogathay]] || [[word:kogathay|kogathay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogathay|thogathay]] || [[word:jogathay|jogathay]] || [[word:shogathay|shogathay]] || [[word:kogathay|kogathay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]] || [[word:gathay|gathay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gathay|th忙gathay]] || [[word:j忙gathay|j忙gathay]] || [[word:sh忙gathay|sh忙gathay]] || [[word:k忙gathay|k忙gathay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathagathay|thathagathay]] || [[word:jajagathay|jajagathay]] || [[word:shashagathay|shashagathay]] || [[word:kakagathay|kakagathay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagathay|thagathay]] || [[word:jagathay|jagathay]] || [[word:shagathay|shagathay]] || [[word:kagathay|kagathay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagathay|thagathay]] || [[word:jagathay|jagathay]] || [[word:shagathay|shagathay]] || [[word:kagathay|kagathay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shagathay|shagathay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshagathay|goshagathay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishagathay|gokishagathay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shagathayn眉|shagathayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshagathaynkn眉|goshagathaynkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathayn眉|gokishagathayn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shagathaysh毛|shagathaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshagathaynksh毛|goshagathaynksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishagathaysh毛|gokishagathaysh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathayro|shagathayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathaynkro|goshagathaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathayro|gokishagathayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathaymu|shagathaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathaynkmu|goshagathaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathaymu|gokishagathaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shagathaysher|shagathaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshagathaynksher|goshagathaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishagathaysher|gokishagathaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shagathayng|shagathayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshagathaynkng|goshagathaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishagathayng|gokishagathayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shagathayya|shagathayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshagathaynkya|goshagathaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishagathayya|gokishagathayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shagathayyam|shagathayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshagathaynkyam|goshagathaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishagathayyam|gokishagathayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathayn眉sh毛|shagathayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathaynkn眉sh毛|goshagathaynkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathayn眉sh毛|gokishagathayn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathayn眉ro|shagathayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathaynkn眉ro|goshagathaynkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathayn眉ro|gokishagathayn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathayn眉mu|shagathayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathaynkn眉mu|goshagathaynkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathayn眉mu|gokishagathayn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathaysh毛n眉|shagathaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathaynksh毛n眉|goshagathaynksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathaysh毛n眉|gokishagathaysh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathaysh毛ro|shagathaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathaynksh毛ro|goshagathaynksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathaysh毛ro|gokishagathaysh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathaysh毛mu|shagathaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathaynksh毛mu|goshagathaynksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathaysh毛mu|gokishagathaysh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathayron眉|shagathayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathaynkron眉|goshagathaynkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathayron眉|gokishagathayron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathayrosh毛|shagathayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathaynkrosh毛|goshagathaynkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathayrosh毛|gokishagathayrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shagathayromu|shagathayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshagathaynkromu|goshagathaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishagathayromu|gokishagathayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shagathaymun眉|shagathaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshagathaynkmun眉|goshagathaynkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishagathaymun眉|gokishagathaymun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shagathaymush毛|shagathaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshagathaynkmush毛|goshagathaynkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishagathaymush毛|gokishagathaymush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shagathaymuro|shagathaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshagathaynkmuro|goshagathaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishagathaymuro|gokishagathaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
